svg.text: Next.js 14 App Router · PostgreSQL · Storage: S3-compatible or UploadThing (choose one)
STORAGE PROVIDER · CHOOSE ONE · cannot switch after first protocol upload
Uses AWS SDK v3 · Presigned URL upload pattern · Max 256 MB per file
2. Fresco → MinIO: generate presigned PUT URL
Same presigned URL upload flow as MinIO
No self-hosted storage component required · Files served from UploadThing CDN
PUBLIC_URL env var must be set
5. Fresco stores URL in Asset table
PUBLIC_URL must exactly match your deployment URL (used for callback verification)
Files are NOT stored locally — hosted on UploadThing's CDN infrastructure
Suitable for cloud/PaaS deployments (Vercel, Render) where local storage is unavailable
ANALYTICS (optional — set DISABLE_ANALYTICS=true to opt out)
PostHog · Relay: ph-relay.networkcanvas.com · Anonymised product telemetry only
All state in PostgreSQL — no Redis required
Sessions: 24 h active / 2 week idle timeout
Storage lock-in: provider fixed after first upload
MinIO or external S3 = same AWS SDK code path
Installation ID generated once; used for 2FA keys
Auto-migrations run at container start via Prisma
